introSection: Galacticoaster is an enclosed steel roller coaster from German company ART Engineering currently under construction at Legoland California in Carlsbad, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In March 2025, Merlin Entertainments announced the new coaster. On September 22, the coaster's name was revealed as Galacticoaster, matching its counterpart being built for Legoland Florida.

fullText:
Galacticoaster is an enclosed steel roller coaster from German company ART Engineering currently under construction at Legoland California in Carlsbad, California, USA.

In March 2025, Merlin Entertainments announced the new coaster. On September 22, the coaster's name was revealed as Galacticoaster, matching its counterpart being built for Legoland Florida.
